title: Night of the Living Dead (1968)
description: The definitive, legendary 1968 black-and-white cinematic horror masterpiece directed by George A. Romero that changed the genre forever.

title: Sintel (Animated Short)
description: An emotional independent open-source fantasy film tracking a lonely, fierce warrior named Sintel searching for her captive baby dragon.

title: Tears of Steel (Sci-Fi VFX)
description: A breathtaking science fiction project tracking a team of soldiers and scientists in a futuristic, dystopian cyberpunk setting.
